creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 239322
git diff for devel/etl

The attached git diff upgrades devel/etl from 1.4.2 to 1.4.4.
This upgrade also comes along with graphics/synfig && graphics/synfigstudio.

CHANGELOG:
https://github.com/synfig/synfig/blob/master/ChangeLog.md

port changes:
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-plist

That's it.

Thanks!

P.S. I'm Maintainer, so approval is implicit. :-)
